0.original: Each time you speak up, you strengthen yourself. 2 00:00:03,440 --> 00:00:06,129 Come forward with your constructive ideas. 3 00:00:06,720 --> 00:00:10,530 We all know how many college students prepare their assignments. 4 00:00:10,720 --> 00:00:16,929 With fine intentions, Joe College sets aside a whole evening for some concentrated study. 5 00:00:17,280 --> 00:00:21,570 Here is a general pattern of how, too often, the evening is spent. 6 00:00:22,879 --> 00:00:28,929 Joe's ready to begin studying at 7 p.m., but his dinner seems just a bit heavy, 7 00:00:28,960 --> 00:00:31,490 so he decides to get in a little TV. 8 00:00:31,680 --> 00:00:36,610 A little turns out to be an hour's worth, since the program was pretty good. 9 00:00:36,800 --> 00:00:44,450 At eight p.m., he sits down at his desk but gets right back up because he just remembered he promised to call his girl. 10 00:00:44,639 --> 00:00:46,610 This shoots another forty minutes. 11 00:00:46,639 --> 00:00:48,530 He hadn't talked to her all day. 12 00:00:48,720 --> 00:00:51,730 An incoming call takes another twenty minutes. 13 00:00:51,840 --> 00:00:56,050 On his way back to his desk, Joe is drawn into a ping-pong game. 14 00:00:56,240 --> 00:00:57,649 Another hour gone. 15 00:00:57,920 --> 00:01:01,649 The ping-pong makes him feel sweaty, so he takes a shower. 16 00:01:01,760 --> 00:01:03,650 Next, he needs a snack. 17 00:01:03,919 --> 00:01:08,130 The combined effect of the ping-pong and the shower have made him hungry. 18 00:01:08,719 --> 00:01:12,770 And so the evening planned with good intentions drifts away. 19 00:01:12,879 --> 00:01:18,770 Finally, at 1 a.m., he opens the book, but he's too sleepy to absorb the subject. 20 00:01:19,120 --> 00:01:21,489 Finally, he surrenders completely. 21 00:01:21,600 --> 00:01:25,969 Next morning, he tells the professor, I hope you give me a break. 22 00:01:26,080 --> 00:01:29,090 I studied till 2 a.m. for this exam. 23 00:01:30,319 --> 00:01:36,690 Joe College didn't get into action because he spent too much time getting ready to get into action. 24 00:01:36,879 --> 00:01:36,879 And Joe College isn't alone in being a victim of over-preparedness.
0.b1: Every time you express your opinion, you become more confident. Share your helpful ideas with others. We all know how college students usually prepare for their homework. With good intentions, a student named Joe plans to spend a whole evening studying hard. Here is a common example of how that evening is often wasted. Joe plans to start studying at 7 p.m., but he feels full after dinner, so he decides to watch a little TV. The "little" TV turns into an hour because the show was good. At 8 p.m., he sits at his desk but stands up again because he remembers he needs to call his girlfriend. This takes another forty minutes. He had not spoken to her all day. Then, an incoming phone call takes another twenty minutes. On his way back to his desk, Joe starts playing a game of ping-pong. Another hour is gone. The ping-pong makes him sweat, so he takes a shower. Next, he wants a snack. The exercise and the shower have made him hungry. In this way, the evening he planned with good intentions slowly disappears. Finally, at 1 a.m., he opens his book, but he is too tired to learn anything. Finally, he gives up completely. The next morning, he tells his professor, "I hope you can understand my situation. I studied until 2 a.m. for this exam." Joe did not actually study because he spent too much time preparing to study. And Joe is not the only person who fails because of too much preparation.
0.cn: 每次你勇敢发言，你都会变得更强大。请提出你建设性的想法。我们都知道大学生通常是如何准备作业的。怀着良好的初衷，乔（Joe）计划花一整个晚上专心学习。以下是一个关于这个晚上通常是如何被浪费的典型例子。乔计划晚上7点开始学习，但他觉得晚饭吃得有点撑，于是决定看一会儿电视。由于节目很好看，这一看就是一小时。晚上8点，他坐在书桌前，但马上又站了起来，因为他想起答应要给女朋友打电话。这又花掉了四十分钟。他一整天都没跟她联系过。接着，一个打进来的电话又占用了二十分钟。在回书桌的路上，乔被拉去打了一场乒乓球。又一个小时过去了。打乒乓球让他出了一身汗，于是他去洗了个澡。接下来，他需要吃点零食。乒乓球和洗澡让他感到饿了。就这样，那个怀着良好初衷计划的夜晚悄然流逝。最后，凌晨1点，他打开书，但已经太困了，无法吸收知识。最终，他彻底放弃了。第二天早上，他告诉教授：“希望您能体谅我。为了这次考试，我学习到了凌晨2点。”乔之所以没有付诸行动，是因为他花了太多时间在“准备行动”上。而且，乔并不是唯一一个因过度准备而受挫的人。
0.ai_notes:
'speak up': to express your opinion clearly and courageously.
'constructive': helpful and intended to improve something.
'Joe College': a stereotypical name used to represent an average or typical male college student.
'sets aside': to reserve time or money for a specific purpose.
'get in': to manage to do something, often when you are busy.
'turns out to be': to prove to be the case after a period of time.
'shoots': informal way to say that something uses up or wastes time.
'drawn into': to become involved in an activity, often against one's original plan.
'drifts away': to pass slowly and unnoticed, usually referring to time or opportunities.
'absorb': to learn and understand new information.
'surrenders': to stop trying or to give up.
'give me a break': an informal request for someone to be understanding or lenient about a mistake.
'victim of over-preparedness': someone who fails because they spend too much time planning instead of actually doing the work.
0.remarks:
'speak up': 清晰且勇敢地表达自己的观点。
'constructive': 有益的，旨在改进某事。
'Joe College': 代表普通或典型男大学生的刻板印象名称。
'sets aside': 为特定目的预留时间或金钱。
'get in': 设法做某事，通常指在忙碌时挤出时间。
'turns out to be': 经过一段时间后证明是某种情况。
'shoots': 非正式说法，指耗费或浪费时间。
'drawn into': 被卷入某项活动，通常违背最初的计划。
'drifts away': 缓慢且不知不觉地流逝，通常指时间和机会。
'absorb': 学习并理解新信息。
'surrenders': 停止尝试或放弃。
'give me a break': 非正式请求，希望对方对错误表示理解或宽容。
'victim of over-preparedness': 因过度计划而未实际行动，导致失败的人。
